guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 22. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_ir: Point to the big IR and say: iririr. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_ur: Now point to the big UR and say: ururur.

parent_story: A little bird saw a turtle surf. The girl laughed at the funny turtle.
